description_long: This object is a triple grave monument set on a large, polished black stone base. It features three upright headstones: the central one is arched and flanked by two rectangular headstones with gently curved tops. Each grave plot is marked by a green rectangular patch, likely representing grass or artificial turf, in front of each headstone. The central headstone is more elaborate, with a gray stone arch and engraved inscriptions, while the side headstones are simpler but similarly styled. The entire structure is symmetrical and designed to accommodate three individuals, with the polished stone base providing a unified, dignified appearance. The materials and finish suggest a modern, well-maintained grave site suitable for an urban cemetery.
description: A triple grave monument with three upright headstones on a polished black stone base, each grave marked by a green patch. The central headstone is arched and more ornate, flanked by two simpler headstones.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all three headstones, the central arched monument, and the green grave markers on a glossy black base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the headstones and the layered structure of the base and grave markers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the three headstones and the symmetry of the monument's layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slimness of the headstones and the arrangement of the grave markers.
